SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractDBDialect
Abstract base class for database dialect implementations.
AbstractExpr
Base abstraction for expressions used in query construction.
AttributeImpl<X,T>
Concrete class that represents an attribute of a jpa entity.
AttributesType
Java class for attributesType complex type.
BasicDataSource
A basic framework provided data source.
BasicJdbcMechanism
Internal Class used to initiate a database call by setting the bind variables.
BasicType
Java class for basicType complex type.
BasicTypeImpl<T>
Implementation of a basic (non-entity) type in the persistence metamodel.
Binder
Abstract binder class used to bind the result set with appropriate entity.
CharUtil
Utility class for string manipulation.
ClassDescriptor
Class to hold the metadata of a JPA entity.
ClassScanner
A class scanner.
ColumnMetadata
Represents metadata for a database table column.
ColumnType
Java class for columnType complex type.
CommentGenHelper
Utility class for generating structured comments such as Javadoc.
CompressionUtil
Utility class for handling data compression and decompression operations.
Condition
Enum to hold the various conditions.
ConnectionDelegate
Acts as a delegating wrapper for a database connection.
ConnectionMetrics
Represents metrics and statistics related to database connection usage.
ConstraintMetadata
Represents metadata for a database constraint.
ConstructorGenHelper
Helper class for generating constructors for target classes or entities.
CreateScriptListener
Listener responsible for executing database creation scripts defined in persistence.xml.
Criteria
JPA Criteria query.
CriteriaDelete
Represents a criteria-based delete operation.
CriteriaUpdate
Represents a criteria-based update operation.
Dao
Annotation to identify a data access object.
DAOClassScanner
Scans and identifies Data Access Object (DAO) classes within a given package or classpath.
DAOProxy
DAO proxy class.
DatabaseQuery
Abstract class to represent a database query.
DB2Dialect
Dialect implementation for IBM DB2 databases.
DBProxy
Abstract claass for all handlers.
DBResultSetHandler
DB result set handler.
DeleteExpr
Represents a delete expression in a query model.
DeleteExprVisitor
Visitor for SelectExpr.
DeleteQuery
Insert query that will handle all delete operation.
DerbyDialect
Dialect implementation for Apache Derby databases.
Dialect
Defines a contract for database dialects.
DriverManagerDataSource
A data source provided by jpa-lite.
EntityAttribute
Interface to represent the metadata of an entity attribute.
EntityAttributeImpl
Platform provided implementation of EntityAttribute class.
EntityClassImpl
Concrete class to represent a managed class/jpa entity.
EntityGenerator
Responsible for generating entity classes or entity representations based on provided metadata, schema definitions, or configuration.
EntityMappingsType
Java class for entity-mappingsType complex type.
EntityMetaExtractor
Extracts metadata specific to entity classes.
EntityTransactionImpl
Concrete class to represent a transaction.
EntityType
Java class for entityType complex type.
EntityTypeImpl<X>
Implementation of an entity type in the persistence metamodel.
EqualsGenHelper
Helper class for generating equals method implementations.
EternalDataSource
Internal data source.
Expr
Represents a criteria expression.
ExprVisitor
A concrete visitor class for evaluating Expr
FactoryStore
Store to hold the actiev EntityManagerFactory.
FieldGenHelper
Helper class for generating field definitions.
FromExpr
From clause expression
FromExprVisitor
Visitor for FromExpr.
GeneralUtility
A general utility class.
GeneratedValueType
Java class for generated-valueType complex type.
GroupByExpr
Group by expression.
GroupByExprVisitor
Visitor for GroupByExpr.
H2Dialect
Dialect implementation for H2 in-memory database.
HashCodeGenHelper
Helper class for generating hashCode method implementations.
HikariLiteDataSource
Lightweight DataSource implementation inspired by HikariCP.
IdentifiableTypeImpl<X>
Implementation of an identifiable type in a persistence model.
IdType
Java class for idType complex type.
IndexRetrievalStrategy
Class that follows index based retrieval strategy.
Injector
Central component responsible for dependency injection and object provisioning.
Inner
Represents an INNER join type.
InsertQuery
Insert query that will handle all insert operation.
JdbcException
The JPA-LiTE framework will throw JdbcException if the query execution fails.
JdbcReader
JDBC Reader object.
JdbcWriter
JDBC writer class.
JpaEntity
Represents metadata for a JPA entity.
JpaField
Represents metadata for a JPA entity field.
JpaLiteDataSource
An advanced framework provided data source.
JpaLiteMetrics
Provides metrics and monitoring support for JPA Lite operations.
LeftOuter
Represents a LEFT OUTER join type.
LiteConnectionPool
Manages a pool of reusable database connections in a lightweight manner.
LiteDataSourceConfig
Configuration class for lightweight data source setup.
LiteEntityManager
Native Entity Manager to interact with the persistence context.
LiteEntityManagerFactory
JPA LiTE entity manager factory.
LiteEntityManagerImpl
Concrete class to represent a LiTE entity manager.
LiteMetricsStore
Stores and manages metrics collected from lightweight components such as connection pools or data sources.
LitePersistenceContext
Interface to represent a persistence context.
LitePersistenceProvider
Persistence provider for LiTE jpa framework.
LitePooledConnection
Represents a lightweight wrapper around a physical database connection managed within a connection pool.
LtModelInitializer
Initializes and configures lightweight model representations.
LtSchemaInitializer
JPA-LiTE schema initializer.
ManagedTypeImpl<X>
Class that represents a concrete managed type.
MD5HashGenerator
MD5 hash generator class.
MDExtractor
Extractor class to extract the metadata of a jpa entity.
MetadataExtractor
Extracts metadata from classes, schemas, or configuration sources.
MetadataGenerator
Class responsible for generating the metadata for all managed classes.
MetadataModelImpl
Implementation of metadata model class.
MethodGenHelper
Helper class for generating method definitions programmatically.
ModelProcessor
Model Processor class.
MySqlDialect
Dialect implementation for MySQL databases.
NamedNativeQueriesType
Java class for named-native-queriesType complex type.
NamedNativeQueryType
Java class for named-native-queryType complex type.
NamedQueryStore
Store for all named queries.
NamedQueryStoreImpl
Implementation of a store for named queries.
NameRetrievalStrategy
Class that follows index based retrieval strategy.
NativeJdbcQuery
An extension of SelectObjectQuery and JPA TypedQuery.
NotSupported
API that does not support a txn must annotate themselves with this tag.
ObjectCreationUtil
Utility class providing helper methods for dynamic object instantiation.
ObjectFactory
This object contains factory methods for each Java content interface and Java element interface generated in the org.javalabs.decl.orm package.
OneToManyBinder
One-to-many Binder class.
OneToOneBinder
One-to-one Binder class.
Operator
Enum listing the set of supported operators for criteria query.
OracleDialect
Dialect implementation for Oracle databases.
OrderByExpr
Order by expression.
OrderByExprVisitor
Visitor for OrderByExpr.
ParameterImpl
Parameter class.
PersistenceContextImpl
Platfor provided implementation of LitePersistenceContext.
PersistenceHandler
Core class of custom ORM framework.
PersistenceHolder
Holder class to keep the metadata details.
PersistenceUnitCache
Cache to store the PersistenceUnitInfo.
PersistenceUnitCacheImpl
Concrete class that represents a cache.
PersistenceUnitInfoImpl
Platform provided persistence unit info.
PersistenceVerifier
This verifier class verifies the database properties in the persistence config file.
PGJaxbOrmBridge
Bridges PostgreSQL-specific schema or metadata with JAXB-based ORM representations.
PoolDataSource
Interface to represent a datasource object.
PooledConnectionEventListener
Listener interface for receiving events related to pooled connection life cycle.
PostConstructListener
The listener that will be called after the persistence unit is loaded.
PostgresDialect
Dialect implementation for PostgreSQL databases.
PrimaryKeyMetadata
Represents metadata for a primary key constraint.
ProxyStore
This is the class where all the proxy objects will be kept.
PUInjector
Injector implementation that integrates dependency injection with a JPA persistence unit.
Query
Base interface to represent a query executor.
QueryAttribute
Attributes of a Named/Native Query.
QueryBuffer
Class that represents the buffer to temporarily hold the raw sql query string.
QueryBuilder
Query builder interface.
QueryCache
Internal cache to store the generated and pre-compiled sql queries.
QueryCache.NativeQuery
NativeQuery is the cache element.
QueryCache.QueryType
 
QueryExpr
The expression criteria class to hold the parsed expression.
QueryHints
Defines constants and utilities for specifying query hints in JPA operations.
QueryHints.RetrievalStrategy
 
QueryMechanism
The query mechanism interface.
RelAttribute
This class represents the metadata of a relational attribute present in an entity.
RelAttribute.Join
Represent a JoinColumn annotation in a parent-child relationship.
RelAttribute.JoinType
 
RelAttribute.Relation
This class represents the relationship between two entities.
RelAttribute.RelType
 
RelAttributeImpl
Implementation of RelAttribute.
RelAttributeImpl.JoinImpl
 
RelAttributeImpl.RelationImpl
 
Required
Annotation to identify whether a new transaction will be started.
RequiresNew
Annotation to identify whether a new transaction will be started.
ResultSetHandler
Jdbc Result set Handler.
RetrievalStrategy
Abstract class to define the column value retrieval strategy.
RightOuter
Represents a RIGHT OUTER join type.
SBPool
This is a query builder pool.
SBPoolImpl
Implementation of SBPool.
SchemaGenerator
Schema generator.
SelectExpr
Select expression.
SelectExprVisitor
Visitor for SelectExpr.
SelectQuery
Select Object Query class.
SetExpr
Set clause expression.
SetExprVisitor
Visitor for WhereExpr.
SingularAttributeImpl<X,T>
Implementation of a singular attribute in the persistence metamodel.
SQLDialect
The SQL Dialect.
SQLQueryBuilder
Builder class to generate the SQL Query.
SqlQueryCache
Concrete class that represents a sql query cache.
SqlQueryCache.NativeSQLQuery
 
SybaseDialect
Dialect implementation for Sybase databases.
TableMetadata
Represents metadata for a database table.
TableType
Java class for tableType complex type.
TransactionalProxy
Dynamic proxy for database connection and transaction management.
TxnEntityManagerDelegate
Delegate wrapper around an EntityManager that adds transaction-aware behavior.
TypeImpl<X>
Base implementation of a type in the persistence metamodel.
UnitOfWork
Indicates a unit of work to be performed.
UpdateExpr
Represents an update expression in a query model.
UpdateExprVisitor
Visitor for SelectExpr.
UpdateQuery
Insert query that will handle all update operation.
Visitable
Interface that represents a visitable object.
Visitor
Interface that represents a visitor.
WhereExpr
Where clause expression.
WhereExprVisitor
Visitor for WhereExpr.
Work
Indicates a work that an EntityManager is performing.
WriteQuery
Indicates a database write query.
